visits.summary: Extraction of all four wisdom teeth (#1, #16, #17, #32)
visits.details: All four third molars removed under IV sedation. #1 and #17 were fully impacted; #16 and #32 were partially erupted. Uneventful recovery.

visits.summary: Comprehensive exam, full mouth radiographs, and prophylaxis
visits.details: New patient intake. Full mouth series and panoramic radiograph taken. Overall good oral health. Mild gingivitis noted in lower anteriors — improved home care recommended.
6-month recall visit. Gingivitis resolved. No new findings. Fluoride varnish applied.

visits.summary: Routine cleaning — patient noted teeth sensitivity to cold
visits.details: Prophylaxis completed. Patient reports intermittent cold sensitivity on upper right. Clinical exam unremarkable. Sensitivity toothpaste recommended. Monitor at next visit.

visits.summary: Annual exam — early enamel erosion noted on #8
visits.details: Periodic exam with bitewing radiographs. Early enamel erosion detected on lingual surface of #8. Patient reports occasional acid reflux. Discussed GERD referral. Fluoride varnish applied.

visits.summary: Annual exam — amalgam on #14 showing marginal wear
visits.details: Periodic exam and prophylaxis. Existing amalgam on #14 showing early marginal breakdown. Monitoring for now. Enamel erosion on #8 stable — patient managing reflux with GI specialist.
Patient presented with sensitivity on #3. Caries detected on mesial and distal surfaces. Composite resin restoration (MOD) placed under local anesthesia. Good bond achieved.

visits.summary: Root canal therapy and zirconia crown on #19
visits.details: Patient presented with spontaneous pain on #19. Pulp vitality testing confirmed irreversible pulpitis. Root canal completed by Dr. Patel (endodontist). Same-day zirconia crown prep and temporary placed. Final crown seated 2024-10-08.

visits.summary: Annual exam — #14 amalgam fracture progressing, #30 early recurrent decay
visits.details: Periodic exam with full mouth radiographs. #14 amalgam showing definitive marginal ridge fracture — crown treatment planned. #30 showing early demineralization at distal filling margin. #19 root canal and crown in excellent condition. #3 composite stable.

First visit using PALOMA AI-assisted imaging. Full mouth assessed with AI confidence scoring. #14 fracture confirmed — crown scheduled for Jul 10. #30 recurrent decay confirmed by AI (91% confidence) — restoration needed within 4-6 weeks. #8 erosion stable. All other teeth healthy. Next visit scheduled Dec 15, 2026.
